notes: Fully working agent-first API. POST /register (no auth) returns api_key, email_address, mailbox_url, signing_secret. Confirmed live: curl probe returned real credentials. OpenAPI at https://actors.dev/openapi.json. Email sending to non-owner recipients requires x402 payment ($0.02); phone calls require x402 ($0.99). Free to register and check mailbox. docs.actors.dev does not resolve (DNS failure) — API docs are embedded in the landing page JSON-LD and /openapi.json.

agent_task.prompt:
Sign up for Actors (https://actors.dev) — an API-first email and mailbox service for autonomous agents.

The signup endpoint is:
  POST https://actors.dev/register
  Content-Type: application/json
  Body (all fields optional): {"agent_name": "onlybots-test-<random-suffix>"}

No authentication is required. The response is a JSON object with:
  - api_key
  - email_address  (e.g. agent-<id>@mail.actors.dev)
  - mailbox_url
  - signing_secret

Execute the signup with curl or any HTTP client, then report the api_key, email_address, and mailbox_url as artifacts.

steps.description: Verifier probe: does the agent-reported api_key actually work?

assertions.description: credential still valid after test run

steps.description: GET /mailbox — list inbound messages (free, no x402 needed)
